daikin1: Room 4 [program stopped as of 7 Jn 2024] Mon. 6:00–9:00pm for 70/73 in the summer and 70/74 in the winter (GriefShare) Tue. 8:00–9:00pm for 70/73 in the summer and 70/74 in the winter (Youth Group) Thu. 7:30am–3:15pm for 70/73 in the summer and 70/74 in the winter (Classical Conversations) Thu. 5:30–8:00pm for 69/72 in the summer and 70/74 in the winter (Awana) Sun. 7:00am–1:00pm for 70/73 in the summer and 70/74 in the winter (Church) Sun. 4:30–7:30pm for 67/73 in the summer and 67/74 in the winter (Journey)
